Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Relates to increasing tax rates imposed on unincorporated businesses and corporations in New York city
Summary: Increases tax rates imposed on unincorporated businesses and corporations in New York city upon adoption of a local law by the local legislative body of the city of New York.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 772 of the laws of 1966, relating to enabling any city having a population of one million or more to raise tax revenue; and to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to increasing tax rates imposed on unincorporated businesses and corporations in New York city for taxable years beginning on or after January first, two thousand twenty-six, upon adoption of a local law by the local legislative body of the city of New York
